# Contributing

No runtime dependencies. You need Node (v18+) and git.

## Files

Edit these:

- `bookmarklet/bookmarklet-source.js` — all JS logic
- `bookmarklet/styles.css` — all CSS
- `extension/popup.html`, `extension/popup.js`, `extension/customize.js`, `extension/manifest.json`, `extension/icons/`, `extension/fonts/` — popup + static extension assets (not generated)

`build/` is gitignored — it's assembled by the build (copy of `extension/` plus
the generated `run.js`) and isn't committed.

Generated by the build — do not edit by hand:

- `build/` — the full unpacked extension (copied from `extension/` + generated `run.js`)
- `bookmarklet/bookmarklet.txt` — the `javascript:` bookmarklet URL
- `bookmarklet/install.html` — drag-to-install page

## Build

```bash
node build.mjs       # or: npm run build
```

Run after every change to `bookmarklet-source.js` or `styles.css`, or before
loading the extension locally — `build/` doesn't exist until you do.

```bash
npm run check        # syntax-check the source only
npm run verify       # build + fail if bookmarklet outputs are stale (what CI runs)
```

`bookmarklet.txt` and `install.html` are committed and checked for drift in CI;
`build/` itself is not committed.

## Load in the browser

Chrome — `chrome://extensions` → enable Developer mode → Load unpacked → select `build/`.
Firefox — `about:debugging#/runtime/this-firefox` → Load Temporary Add-on → pick `build/manifest.json`.

After editing: reload the extension, then reload the quiz tab.

## Edit loop

1. Edit `bookmarklet-source.js` or `styles.css`
2. `node build.mjs`
3. Reload the extension and the quiz page

## Release

Tag version must equal the manifest version.

1. Set the same version in `extension/manifest.json` and `package.json`
2. `node build.mjs && git add -A && git commit -m "vX.Y.Z" && git push`
3. `git tag vX.Y.Z && git push origin vX.Y.Z`

`release.yml` then verifies tag == manifest version, builds + zips `build/`,
and publishes a GitHub Release with the zip attached.

## Chrome Web Store

Manual. Requires repo secrets `CHROME_EXTENSION_ID`, `CHROME_CLIENT_ID`,
`CHROME_CLIENT_SECRET`, `CHROME_REFRESH_TOKEN`, then run `publish-chrome.yml` from
the Actions tab.
